name: Spicy Zucchini Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend butter and sugar in a bowl.
2. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Sift together dry ingredients: flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, vanilla, ground cloves, ginger, and allspice.
4. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the egg mixture.
5. Stir in grated zucchini.
6. Fold in raisins and chopped nuts.
7. Place batter on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
9. Makes 6 medium-sized cookies.
10. Frost with cream cheese icing. Enjoy.
